accepted_changes: Regenerated pricing artifacts from the current tool after product-query overlay was added.
Resolved product-query sampling through absolute nose binary paths and recorded sampled semantic-pack ids.
Made zero-presence unpriced next actions verdict-sensitive.
Tightened broad regex matchers where they inflated row evidence.
Demoted unsupported ready evidence for Apache Commons Lang StringUtils.
Added per-reviewer entries for every pricing iteration.

findings: copyOf is included in the priced-ready packet without explicit source-domain/effect proof.
resolution: accepted: added copyOf source-domain/effect proof to required evidence.

findings: Observable signal was inflated by generic Observable text, comments, and synthetic fixtures.
resolution: accepted: replaced generic Observable matching with actual pipe identity-map and filter(Boolean) operators.

findings: RxJS Observable signal was mostly false-positive text/comment matches rather than adapter rows.
resolution: accepted: replaced generic Observable matching with actual pipe identity-map and filter(Boolean) operators.

findings: Operator regex caught ordinary map/filter calls in files that merely contained RxJS context.
resolution: accepted: restricted projection matching to operators inside pipe(...) windows.

findings: Corpus count was inflated by file-level context and ordinary array map/filter samples.
resolution: accepted: restricted projection matching to operators inside pipe(...) windows.

findings: The row claimed Tokio future identity adapters but counted spawn/select/join/test boundaries.
resolution: accepted: demoted to unpriced and recorded the signal as a rejected runtime-boundary candidate.

findings: Matcher counted spawn/test boundaries, not identity adapters.
resolution: accepted: demoted to unpriced and recorded the signal as a rejected runtime-boundary candidate.

findings: StreamExt signal caught ordinary Option/Result map calls in stream-context files.
resolution: accepted: restricted matching to then/filter_map stream-style operators and kept the row unpriced until receiver-proximate proof exists.

findings: StreamExt row was polluted by ordinary Option/Result map in files with broad stream context.
resolution: accepted: restricted matching to then/filter_map stream-style operators and kept the row unpriced until receiver-proximate proof exists.
